hero.title: Powerful Features For Every Restaurant
hero.description: From AI-powered setup to delivery management, everything you need to run a successful restaurant business in one beautiful platform.

categories.sectionDescription: Explore our comprehensive suite of features designed to help you grow your restaurant business.

onlineOrdering.title: Online Ordering
onlineOrdering.description: Streamline your ordering process with a seamless customer experience

smartShoppingCart.title: Smart Shopping Cart
smartShoppingCart.description: Intuitive cart with real-time updates, quantity controls, and special instructions support.
smartShoppingCart.benefit: Reduce cart abandonment by up to 35%

oneClickCheckout.title: One-Click Checkout
oneClickCheckout.description: Save customer details for lightning-fast repeat orders with Stripe integration.

realTimeOrderTracking.title: Real-Time Order Tracking
realTimeOrderTracking.description: Live order status updates from preparation to delivery or pickup.
realTimeOrderTracking.benefit: Reduce "Where is my order?" calls by 80%

scheduledOrdering.title: Scheduled Ordering
scheduledOrdering.description: Let customers order hours or days in advance for pickup or delivery.

orderNotifications.title: Order Notifications
orderNotifications.description: Instant SMS and email alerts for new orders, updates, and confirmations.

menuManagement.title: Menu Management
menuManagement.description: Create and manage beautiful, engaging menus with AI assistance

aiPoweredMenuSetup.title: AI-Powered Menu Setup
aiPoweredMenuSetup.description: Upload photos and descriptions. Our AI organizes everything into categories, suggests prices, and creates modifiers.
aiPoweredMenuSetup.benefit: Go from zero to live menu in under 5 minutes

customModifiersOptions.title: Custom Modifiers & Options
customModifiersOptions.description: Add toppings, sizes, cooking preferences, and special requests with ease.

photoGalleries.title: Photo Galleries
photoGalleries.description: Upload multiple high-quality photos to showcase your dishes beautifully.

multiLanguageMenus.title: Multi-Language Menus
multiLanguageMenus.description: AI translates your menu into Finnish, English, Swedish, and more automatically.

qrCodeMenus.title: QR Code Menus
qrCodeMenus.description: Generate printable QR codes for table-side ordering and contactless menus.

paymentProcessing.title: Payment Processing
paymentProcessing.description: Accept payments securely and get paid instantly

stripeIntegration.title: Stripe Integration
stripeIntegration.description: Accept all major credit cards, mobile wallets, and local payment methods through Stripe.

instantPayouts.title: Instant Payouts
instantPayouts.description: Configure daily automatic payouts to your bank account. No waiting weeks for your money.

mobilePayments.title: Mobile Payments
mobilePayments.description: Accept Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other mobile wallets for seamless checkout.

digitalReceipts.title: Digital Receipts
digitalReceipts.description: Automatic email receipts with order details and easy re-order links.

deliveryManagement.title: Delivery Management
deliveryManagement.description: Take control of your delivery operations or integrate with partners

deliveryZones.title: Delivery Zones
deliveryZones.description: Define custom delivery areas with radius-based or polygon zones and unique fees.

dynamicFeeCalculation.title: Dynamic Fee Calculation
dynamicFeeCalculation.description: Set fees based on distance, order size, or time-of-day with automatic adjustments.

driverApp.title: Driver App
driverApp.description: Dedicated mobile app for delivery drivers with route optimization and status updates.

driverManagement.title: Driver Management
driverManagement.description: Assign orders to drivers, track deliveries, and optimize routes.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Data-driven insights to grow your business

salesAnalytics.title: Sales Analytics
salesAnalytics.description: Track revenue, average order value, and growth over time with beautiful visualizations.

popularItemsReport.title: Popular Items Report
popularItemsReport.description: Discover your best-sellers and underperforming items to optimize your menu.

customerInsights.title: Customer Insights
customerInsights.description: Understand customer behavior, order frequency, and lifetime value.

peakHourAnalysis.title: Peak Hour Analysis
peakHourAnalysis.description: Identify your busiest times to optimize staffing and preparation.
peakHourAnalysis.benefit: Reduce wait times and improve service

marketing.title: Marketing Tools
marketing.description: Attract new customers and keep them coming back

promotionsDiscounts.title: Promotions & Discounts
promotionsDiscounts.description: Create coupon codes, percentage discounts, and BOGO offers with ease.

loyaltyPrograms.title: Loyalty Programs
loyaltyPrograms.description: Reward repeat customers with points, free items, and exclusive perks.

emailCampaigns.title: Email Campaigns
emailCampaigns.description: Send targeted email campaigns to announce specials, events, and promotions.
emailCampaigns.benefit: Reach customers directly in their inbox

socialSharing.title: Social Sharing
socialSharing.description: Easy sharing to Facebook, Instagram, and other social platforms.

multiLocation.title: Multi-Location Support
multiLocation.description: Manage multiple restaurants from a single dashboard

centralizedManagement.title: Centralized Management
centralizedManagement.description: Manage menus, prices, and settings across all locations from one admin panel.

locationSpecificOptions.title: Location-Specific Options
locationSpecificOptions.description: Customize menus, pricing, and delivery zones for each location independently.

aggregatedReporting.title: Aggregated Reporting
aggregatedReporting.description: View individual location performance or consolidated reports across all locations.
aggregatedReporting.benefit: See the big picture and details

roleBasedAccess.title: Role-Based Access
roleBasedAccess.description: Grant location managers access only to their specific restaurant data.

mobileFriendly.title: Mobile Friendly
mobileFriendly.description: Perfect experience on every device, everywhere

responsiveDesign.title: Responsive Design
responsiveDesign.description: Your site looks stunning on phones, tablets, and desktops automatically.

pwaSupport.title: PWA Support
pwaSupport.description: Progressive Web App technology lets customers install your site like a native app.

offlineCapability.title: Offline Capability
offlineCapability.description: Menu browsing works even with poor or no internet connection.
offlineCapability.benefit: Never lose a customer to connectivity issues

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: Optimized performance loads pages instantly even on older devices.

comparison.sectionDescription: See how we compare to traditional delivery platforms and ordering systems.

paymentProcessing.helmies: Direct Stripe - funds in your account
paymentProcessing.traditional: Held by platform, paid out weekly/monthly

integrations.sectionDescription: Connect with the tools you already use. From payment processors to marketing platforms, we have got you covered.

cta.sectionDescription: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Helmies to grow their business. No credit card required. Setup in 5 minutes.

setupTime.description: Average setup time with AI-powered wizard

commission.description: Commission on every order you receive

support.description: Finnish support whenever you need help
